body.title: Make reading pipeline deposit schema configurable
body.result: target_schema param added to create_campaign + process_one_chunk; competition path uses direct psycopg2 INSERT; 9 tests pass (9ba35c46)
body.intention: I intend that the reading pipeline can deposit to any target schema so the competition corpus stays isolated from production.
body.description:
The infra.reading_blocks pipeline currently hardcodes `clan` as the deposit target schema. Add a `target_schema` parameter to the campaign runner so we can deposit to `competition` instead. Existing campaigns default to `clan` unchanged.

**Affected files:** TBD — reading campaign runner code (infra.reading_blocks processor, likely `devices/` or `lab/` — discovery step in sprint)
**Design rules:** no TheIgors imports; schema param must default to clan so production behavior is unchanged
**Scope boundary:** Schema routing only. No changes to extraction logic, chunking, or LLM calls.
**Completion criteria:** Creating a campaign with `target_schema=competition` deposits memories to competition.memories; running without the param deposits to clan.memories as before; 1 test covering each path.
